recommendations.title: The Stranger by the Shore
recommendations.overview: Abandoned after coming out, Shun befriends Mio just before he has to move. Years later, Mio returns with a confession. How will Shun feel?

recommendations.overview: Yuuta and Rikka are in their third year of high school. One day in Spring, Touka declares that she will take Rikka to Italy with her, as her job has stabilized there and thinks they should migrate together as a family. Touka is also worried about Rik

recommendations.title: Hello World
recommendations.overview: A shy high schooler in Kyoto meets a man claiming to be his future self, who tells him he’s hacked into the past to save their first love.

recommendations.title: Scrooge: A Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: On a cold Christmas Eve, selfish miser Ebenezer Scrooge has one night left to face his past — and change the future — before time runs out.

recommendations.title: Cinderella the Cat
recommendations.overview: Cenerentola struggles to escape the shadow and evil schemes of her stepmother and six stepsisters who all live aboard the Megaride, a ship stuck in the port of a decaying future Naples.
recommendations.director: Marino Guarnieri, Alessandro Rak, Ivan Cappiello, Dario Sansone

recommendations.title: The Visitor from the Future
